cards.front: What is the Chi-square distribution used for in statistics?
cards.back: As a test of goodness of fit

cards.front: What is the null hypothesis for a Chi-square goodness of fit test?
cards.back: The observed frequencies are all equal to the expected frequencies under the null hypothesis

cards.front: What is the alternative hypothesis for a Chi-square goodness of fit test?
cards.back: The observed frequencies are not all equal to the expected frequencies under the null hypothesis

cards.front: What is the purpose of the expected frequencies in a Chi-square goodness of fit test?
cards.back: To compare the observed frequencies with the frequencies that would be expected if the null hypothesis were true

cards.front: What is the main assumption required for a Chi-square goodness of fit test?
cards.back: The observations are independent and identically distributed
